title: Velvety Italian Pasta
description: A fresh and kid-friendly Italian dish featuring confit tomato and orange blossom water, served in a tagliere vessel, perfect for a family dinner
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to the package instructions until al dente
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic until fragrant
Add the confit tomato to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and oil
Add the orange blossom water to the skillet and stir to combine with the tomato mixture
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the tomato mixture
Stir in the grated grana padano cheese until melted and well combined
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste
Transfer the pasta to a tagliere vessel and top with chopped fresh basil
Serve the pasta immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired
